p.strong: I. When emit_label(Label ID N) is called:

ol.li:
Iterate from i = 0 to forward_jump_count:
If forward_jumps[i].target_label == N:
patch_addr = forward_jumps[i].patch_location
rel32 = label_addresses[N] - (patch_addr + 4)
*(int32_t*)patch_addr = (int32_t)rel32

p.strong: II. When emit_jump(Label ID N) is called (Label undefined):

g.text: OFFSET: 0x0000 | Label ID -> Code Address Mapping | SIZE: 2048B
